title: Jean-François and the Meaning of Life
original_title: Jean-François i el sentit de la vida
overview: A twelve-year-old existentialist kid runs away from home to meet his favorite philosopher, Albert Camus, not knowing he has been dead for fifty years. On his way he finds love and rejection for the first time in his life.
